chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C. P. No. D — 1019 of 2018. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE[S] 27.04.2022. FOR ORDERS ON OFFICE OBJECTION. FOR ORDERS ON M.A.5425/2018. FOR HEARING OF MAIN CASE. ------ This matter is pending since 2018 and the petitioner has not cared to have it fixed in court even once. The petitioner has prayed for the following relief:- (a) That the respondent No.1 may be directed to unblock the CNIC of the petitioner immediately which is illegally and unlawfully blocked. (b) That the respondent No.2 may be directed to withdraw his application from NADRA and not to repeat such act in future until and unless the petitioner is his wedded wife. (c) That the respondent No.2 may be directed to withdraw the F.C. Suit NO.528/2016 having no cause of action, which just filed to blackmail and to harass the petitioner. (d) Any other relief(s) which may be deemed fit and proper in favour of petitioner may be awarded. It appears that the prayer clause ‘C’ does not come within the frame of Article 199. Even otherwise since the petitioner is not in attendance dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE A.
